settings.title: Design should make you feel
settings.body: Every piece begins with a conversation. We source the finest rattan and the most characterful fabrics from houses like Schumacher, Brunschwig & Fils, GP & J Baker and Zoffany — and we never settle for ordinary. Your home should feel like an extension of who you are.

settings.title: Design with
settings.body:
I'm Nazly — wife, mother of three, and someone who has spent most of her life quietly obsessed with beautiful rooms.

What started as a genuine love of chinoiserie, antiques and the kind of interiors you want to live inside rather than just admire, eventually became something more. When my children headed off to school and I finally had a few hours to myself, I decided to stop collecting inspiration and start making things.

Today, Nazly Habib Design is a small studio making handcrafted rattan, wicker and upholstered furniture — bespoke pieces built around your home, your taste and your life. Every piece is made to order, which means it was made for you.

settings.quote: The Hamptons Armchair is the most complimented piece in our home. It feels like it was always meant to be there.
settings.author: Sophie T., London

settings.quote: Beautiful craftsmanship and fabric — absolutely gorgeous. Nazly understood exactly what I wanted.
settings.author: coffeeandthings, Instagram

settings.quote: The X Stools in GP & J Baker are a genuine conversation piece. Worth every penny and every week of the wait.
settings.author: Layla H., Cairo

settings.title: Delivery
settings.body: Cairo & Giza: 2–3 days for in-stock pieces. International shipping: 1–3 weeks depending on destination.

settings.title: Made to Order
settings.body: Lead times range 2–12 weeks depending on piece. Exact timing confirmed at order. Worth every day.

settings.title: Returns Policy
settings.body: Bespoke & made-to-order pieces are non-refundable. In-stock items accepted within 7 days of delivery.

settings.title: Handmade Note
settings.body: All pieces 100% handmade. Minor size variations of 1–2cm are natural & expected. For pairs, order together.
